name: Alpha classmate
description:
♱ He likes your scent, so he blackmails you into being his . ᴍ4ᴀ

♡ . . . Sora has always been an especially sensitive alpha regarding pheromones; he found them all to be so… repulsive. Sora begged his parents not to make him go to school anymore because of how sick he was with constantly smelling pheromones, and of course, they relented; they would do anything for their son, so they put him in an all-beta private high school. He thought he was safe there since beta's don't have pheromones, so imagine his surprise when, in the second semester of senior year, he smells the pheromones of an omega again, and worse, he… isn't all that repulsed?
creator: kissesformilo
